sources.title: HN: The Vercel breach: OAuth attack exposes risk in platform environment variables
sources.summary: OAuth attack on Vercel exposed risks in environment variable management for cloud platforms.
sources.why_it_matters: Shows real-world risk in developer workflow automation and the need for better secrets management.
sources.reliability_notes: High engagement, real incident, but discussion is anecdotal.

sources.title: SO: Best way to organize a technical reference repository for backend and DevOps
sources.summary: Junior backend developer asks for best practices in organizing technical reference repositories for backend and DevOps.
sources.why_it_matters: Highlights pain in knowledge sharing and onboarding for developer workflow automation.
sources.reliability_notes: Direct user pain, but limited replies.

sources.title: SO: How to measure failure rate for retryable jobs without noisy jobs skewing the metric?
sources.summary: Platform operator asks how to measure failure rates for retryable jobs without noisy jobs skewing metrics.
sources.why_it_matters: Shows pain in observability and reliability for automated developer workflows.

sources.title: HN: CrabTrap: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production
sources.summary: Show HN: HTTP proxy that uses LLMs as a judge to secure agent actions in production.
sources.why_it_matters: Highlights emerging need for agent safety and auditability in developer automation workflows.
sources.reliability_notes: Early-stage, but strong engagement and relevant to agent-first workflows.

sources.title: SO: What is the most effective resilience pattern you’ve implemented in real-world projects?
sources.summary: User asks for most effective resilience patterns in real-world projects and their impact on reliability.
sources.why_it_matters: Direct evidence of pain and solutions in reliability for developer workflow automation.
